description: Inventory transaction type setup table for Oracle Inventory. Each record defines a transaction type used to classify material movements, associate a transaction action and source type, and control how inventory transactions are interpreted by the application.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the inventory transaction type definition.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
columns.description: Business name of the inventory transaction type.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Free-text business description entered to explain the purpose or content of the transaction.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_ACTION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory transaction action that determines how stock is affected.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the source type that explains what business process created the inventory transaction.

columns.name: SHORTAGE_MSG_BACKGROUND_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether shortage msg background applies to the record.

columns.name: SHORTAGE_MSG_ONLINE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether shortage msg online applies to the record.

columns.name: USER_DEFINED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether user defined applies to the record.

columns.name: STATUS_CONTROL_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether status control applies to the record.

columns.name: LOCATION_REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether location required applies to the record.

columns.name: ZD_EDITION_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with zd edition.

columns.name: ZD_SYNC
columns.description: Business attribute of the transaction type used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

business_questions: Find the transaction type used for a material movement.
Display transaction action and source type for each transaction type.
Identify disabled or end-dated transaction types.
Show user-defined transaction types created by the business.
List transaction types used in inventory adjustments or transfers.
Find transaction types that require locator control.
Display setup details for inventory transaction classification.
